```{r}

library(tidyverse)
library(here)
library(dplyr)
rm(list = ls())

# path to your folder
path <- "Data/"

df <- list.files(path, pattern = "PAM\\.csv$", full.names = TRUE) %>%
  map_dfr(read_csv, show_col_types = FALSE)

df <- df %>%
  mutate(
    Temperature = as.numeric(Temperature),
    Pam_value = as.numeric(Pam_value)
  )

df <- df %>%
  mutate(
    ColonyID = paste(Site, Species, Genotype, sep = "_")
  )

#define controls (29C)
controls <- df %>%
  filter(Temperature == 29) %>%
  select(ColonyID, control_PAM = Pam_value)

df2 <- df %>%
  left_join(controls, by = "ColonyID")

#calc percent change from controls
df2 <- df2 %>%
  mutate(
    pct_change = ((Pam_value - control_PAM) / control_PAM) * 100
  )

#make sure % change from all controsl are 0
df2 %>%
  filter(Temperature == 29) %>%
  select(ColonyID, Pam_value, control_PAM, pct_change)

#smmarise
summary_df <- df2 %>%
  group_by(Site, ColonyID, Species, Genotype, Temperature) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_pct_change = mean(pct_change, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_pct_change = sd(pct_change, na.rm = TRUE),
    n = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
library(ggplot2)

ggplot(summary_df, aes(x = Temperature, y = mean_pct_change, group = ColonyID)) +
  geom_line(alpha = 0.3) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
  stat_summary(aes(group = 1), fun = mean, geom = "line", linewidth = 1.2) +
  facet_wrap(~ Species) +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(y = "% change in Fv/Fm", x = "Temperature")

ggplot(summary_df, aes(x = Temperature, y = mean_pct_change, color = Genotype)) +
  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "line", linewidth = 1) +
  stat_summary(fun.data = mean_se, geom = "errorbar", width = 0.2) +
  theme_bw()+
  facet_wrap("Species")

library(lme4)

mod1 <- lmer(
  mean_pct_change ~ Temperature * Species + (1 | Site/ColonyID),
  data = summary_df
)

mod2 <- lmer(
  mean_pct_change ~ poly(Temperature, 2) * Species + (1 | Site/ColonyID),
  data = summary_df
)

summary(mod1)
summary(mod2)
```
